name: Multi-Species Synbiotic Supplementation Enhances Gut Microbial Diversity, Increases Urolithin A and Butyrate Production, and Reduces Inflammation in Healthy Adults: A Randomized, Placebo-Controlled Trial.
short_name: DS-01 urolithin A and butyrate RCT
summary: A 32-participant randomized placebo-controlled healthy-adult synbiotic trial reporting increased urinary urolithin A, fecal butyrate in low-baseline producers, and lower systemic inflammation markers over 91 days.
